body: Luc just texted me — said Elise drew a fish on a piece of wood and wants Pops to turn it into a real guitar. 😂 Cutest thing ever.
Ha. Bring her by the workshop Saturday. I've got a spruce offcut that'd be perfect. She can watch me shape it.
She's gonna lose her mind. You eating before or should I grab grouper from the dock?
Already got a pot of red beans going. Come hungry, I'll have something cold waiting when you pull in.

Got Beau's 3/4 build into the finishing stage today — cedar top, mahogany back and sides. Came out cleaner than I expected for a first kids' guitar. You and Ashley still on for Bayport Fourth of July weekend?
Yeah we'll be there Saturday morning. Beau asks about it literally every day 😂 does he know it's done?
Nope. Diane's got it stashed at her place so he doesn't wander into the shop and find it. Bring that old gig bag if you've still got Marcel's Takamine case.
On it. He's gonna lose his mind. See you Saturday.
Marcel the spruce top on that 000 build finally came in from Luthiers Mercantile. Grain is tight as I've seen in years — gonna be a good one. Might put Elise's name on it if it plays right.
Ha you always say that and then sell it to some tourist. When's it gonna be ready?
Six months minimum if I don't rush the hide glue. You know the rule.
Yeah yeah. Beau wants to learn guitar btw. Diane mentioned it at Sunday lunch. Just saying 😄
Carlos, Elise keeps asking when Grandpa's gonna let her fish off the Lucky Strike. She's been practicing casting in the backyard 😂 Luc said she snagged the fence twice already.
Ha. Tell her the fence doesn't count as a catch. Bring her down to Bayport Saturday morning, tides are good early. I'll rig her a light rod.
She's gonna lose her mind. Should we bring Beau too or is he still too little to stand still on a boat?
Beau stays home one more season. Moving parts, live bait, a four-year-old — that's a recipe. Saturday just Elise.
Grandpa did you really name your charter boat Lucky Strike after the cigarettes lol
Nah, after the first keeper red I ever caught out of Bayport. 1987. Your great-grandma said it was luck and I said it was skill. Boat settled it.
That's actually really cool. Can I come out on a charter this summer?? I promise I won't get seasick this time
Talk to your dad. I'll save you a spot on the July 4th run — light swells in the morning and the reds are stacked up near the grass flats right now. Bring sunscreen.
Grandpa did you really catch a 47 inch redfish this morning?? Luc said you were already back at the dock before noon posting pics 😂
Scales don't lie. 12-weight fly rod too. Man couldn't even lift it right — had to net it myself before he dropped it back in the Gulf.
Can I come out next Saturday? I wanna learn how to use the fly rod fr
Tide's running right around 6am. Tell your dad to have you at Bayport by 5:15 or the window's gone.
Luc told me he's bringing Elise and Beau to Bayport this weekend. You taking them out on the Lucky Strike or is that too much with a full charter?
Just Beau. Elise gets seasick, you know that. Luc's keeping her on the dock while I run the morning trip.
Would it be weird if I came by Saturday afternoon? Haven't seen those two since Easter and I'm only 40 minutes away.
Not weird. Dock cleanup's done by 2:30 most days. I'll let Luc know you're coming.
Henry, Elise picked up the parlor I've been building and actually held it right. Seven years old. Beau just stood there looking bored — but she was listening when I told her not to touch the top.
That's how it starts. You put the right instrument in the right hands and the instrument does the teaching. Don't rush her.
Already thinking about scaling down a neck for her. Got that cedar top sitting in the rack since '19 you always said cedar was kinder to beginners.
Cedar forgives. Good first teacher. Just make sure the action's low or she'll quit by Thursday. 😄
Port livewell pump is grinding again — checked it after we docked. Sounds like the impeller going. You got a Rule 1100 at your place or do I need to hit Tackle Shack before they close?
Yeah I pulled one off the old cooler setup, should be fine. I'll swap it tonight. 4:30 tomorrow still?
4:30. Six clients want to work the Chassahowitzka flats before the tide turns around 7. Diane's already giving me the look about a 3:30 alarm. 😄
Ha. Coffee'll be on the boat when you get there. See you at the ramp.
Saw your granddaughter at the dock this morning with Luc — Elise right? She was eyeing the tackle box like she already knew what was in it 😄
Ha. That's Elise. Seven years old and she wanted to rig her own line. Luc had to talk her down from touching my Shimano reel.
Future captain right there. You takin her out before season wraps?
Thinking one Saturday in October before I pull back to the workshop full time. She wants to catch a redfish. We'll see what the tide gives us.

Claire — fella named Dale Hutchins left me a voicemail, wants 8 guys on back-to-back half-days July 11 and 12. Problem is I've got the Kowalski party on the 11th morning. Any chance you can bump them to the 10th?
Got it. Kowalskis are the 6am departure, right? They rebooked once already back in May so I think they'll move. Want me to go ahead and hold Hutchins a deposit slot in the meantime?
Yeah 6am Kowalskis. Tell Hutchins $150 a head, 8-man minimum holds both days. Reds have been stacking up around marker 47 all week so that group's gonna have a real good time.
Done — I'll call Kowalski this afternoon and send Hutchins the deposit link. Confirmations to you by end of day. 👍
Carlos, still good to donate one of your builds for the fall fundraiser auction? Sept 13th. That dreadnought you brought in last year had half the congregation asking where you learned to build.
Yeah, I'm in. Got a parlor guitar wrapping up — spruce top, mahogany back and sides. Should be done well before Labor Day.
Wonderful. And we still on for Elise's baptism the 20th? Luc and Ashley making the drive down?
They're coming in Friday night. Beau too. I'll be off the water by 2, so I'll head straight from the dock. Don't let it run past 4, David, I've got bottom paint that won't apply itself. 😄

Paul — buried a treble hook in my thumb this morning, client's red drum flopped right as I was grabbing the pliers. Ran the string trick and backed it out clean. Worth a visit or just keep it wrapped and watch it?
Oof. If it came out without leaving a barb and there's no streaking redness by tomorrow, you're probably fine — clean it twice a day, keep it covered. You current on tetanus?
Had one maybe four years back I think. It's already feeling better. Luc's bringing Elise and Beau down from Tampa this weekend so I'd rather not be sitting in your waiting room Friday.
Check your shot record when you get a chance — if it's past five years come by before the weekend. And try not to let a sore thumb mess up the fretwork. I know how you get.
Hey Renee — got a dark spot on my left forearm that wasn't there last season. Probably nothing but I'm out on the water six days a week so figured I'd run it by you. Worth coming in?
Definitely worth a look, Carlos. How long have you noticed it? Any change in size or border? Can you get in this week?
Maybe 3 weeks? Hard to say. I've got charters every morning through the end of July, can't do anything before 2:30. You got a late afternoon slot Thursday?
I have a 3 PM Thursday open — take it. And honestly with the Gulf sun you're logging, you should be in here every year anyway. See you then.
Rick, had back-to-back 6-man charters Friday and Saturday — best two-day stretch since May. Want to move $4k into the SEP before the quarter closes. You still running the same fund options?
Nice. Same options are open, or I can park it in the money market till we talk. You free Thursday after 3?
Thursday's tight — Luc and Ashley are bringing the grandkids down for the weekend. Wednesday after I dock, around 2:30, work for you?
Wednesday 2:30's good. I'll pull your Q2 picture before then so we're not starting from scratch.
Tommy — neck reset's done on your Martin. Pitch is right where it needs to be, action's clean all the way up the board. Come grab it whenever, I'll be in the workshop after 2 most days this week.
Man I've been missing that guitar. Wednesday work? Figured I'd bring the Shiner and we could run through those two new verses on 'Bayport Blues' while I'm there.
Wednesday's fine, just don't show up before 2:30 — got a half-day grouper run and Luc's riding along, so cleanup'll take a minute. Those verses need a bridge or they're gonna float.
Ha fair. I'll bring what I got and we'll see if it sinks. See you Wednesday. 🎸

Gene, asked Luc if Beau wants to come out on Lucky Strike Saturday morning — kid's 8 now, old enough to hold a rod. You think the Legion would want to sponsor a free youth fishing trip out of Bayport this summer?
Carlos that's a hell of an idea. We've been looking for something outdoors for the family day in August. How many kids you think you could take out?
Realistically 6 at a time, two trips. I'll bring Luc along to help manage the deck. Only cost is bait and fuel, Legion covers that and I'll call it even.
You got a deal. Let me bring it to the committee Thursday. Elise and Beau coming too? Be good for photos.
Lucky Strike came in looking heavy around noon — y'all hit something good out past the markers today?
Redfish were stacked up off the grass flats around the 9-mile mark. Put six clients on limits before 11. Cleaned up quick, hose down by 2.
Nice. You taking Beau out this weekend? Kid's been asking about it every time he rides his bike past the dock.
Saturday morning if the weather holds. Luc's dropping him off Friday night. First real charter run, not just puttering around the harbor.
Hey, Luc said Elise has been begging to go out on the Lucky Strike all summer. You got a slow morning this week she could tag along?
Saturday's booked solid, 6 clients out to the grouper grounds. Sunday I got a half-day with a couple from Tampa — she can ride along if she's up by 4:30.
4:30 AM?? She's 7, Carlos 😂 I'll ask Luc but don't hold your breath.
She taps out, she stays on the dock with the pelicans. Either way she'll have a story. Tell Luc to bring her Sunday.

Billy, got your Telecaster rewired but I'm stuck on the marina till tomorrow morning — Luc's helping me pull the starboard fuel pump on Lucky Strike and we lost daylight. Swing by the workshop Thursday?
No rush Cap, Thursday works. What was wrong with the wiring anyway?
Previous guy bridged the ground wrong on the neck pickup. Sounded like a tin can. Fixed it and swapped the 3-way switch too, the old one had slop in it.
Damn, no wonder it was buzzing so bad. I'll be there Thursday around 2. Appreciate you Cap 🤙
